# certcentral_team (Resource)

Manages a team configuration in cert-central.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "certcentral_team" "example" {
  name        = "infrastructure"
  description = "Infrastructure and Platform Engineering team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the team.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the team.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique UUID identifier of the team.
